metadata.description: AI-operated audio notification system for Claude Code & Cursor IDE. 26 hooks, native matcher routing, TTS, webhook fan-out, status line, focus flow, rate-limit alerts. Auto-bridges to Cursor IDE 3.2.16+; native install for Cursor-only via 'audio-hooks install --cursor'.

plugins.name: audio-hooks
plugins.description: Audio notifications + AI-controlled config for every Claude Code & Cursor IDE event. Auto-bridges to Cursor 3.2.16+; native Cursor install via 'audio-hooks install --cursor'.
